title: Sesame Crispy Norval
description: A savory, crispy Norwegian dish featuring sesame seed oil and sugar-free-friendly preparation methods.

ingredients.name: Pork belly
ingredients.notes: Use lean cuts to reduce fat content

ingredients.name: Cornstarch
ingredients.notes: To coat pork and achieve a crispy texture

instructions: Marinate the pork belly in a mixture of soy sauce, sesame seed oil, and cornstarch overnight.
Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat. Add water to the pot and bring it to a boil.
Once boiling, place the marinated pork inside the preheated pot. Cook for 10 minutes at high pressure followed by 5 minutes of natural release.
After cooking, use a slotted spoon to transfer pork from the pot onto a plate lined with parchment paper or silicone mat.
Sprinkle cayenne pepper flakes on top of each slice if desired and coat lightly with sesame seed oil before serving for added crunch and flavor.
